notes: Railways is a Union subject handled by the Ministry of Railways
Higher education / central policy; school education is largely a State subject
Police is primarily a State subject; MHA coordinates at the Union level
General grievances escalate via CPGRAMS; PMO at the top of the chain
Water supply is typically delivered by Urban Local Bodies / state water boards
City roads via ULB; highways via MoRTH/state PWD
Solid waste handled by Urban Local Bodies
Drainage handled by Urban Local Bodies
Street lighting handled by Urban Local Bodies
Elections and voter registration handled by the Election Commission of India
Courts and justice - Supreme Court at the apex; High Courts at state level
Income tax and central taxes handled by the Ministry of Finance
Public health - Union policy via MoHFW; delivery largely by State health departments
